message:
test(fcp-mesh): enhance integration test logging with JSONL compliance

Update mesh integration tests to emit structured JSONL logs compliant
with docs/STANDARD_Testing_Logging.md specification.

Changes to TestEvent struct:
- Add timestamp field (RFC 3339 with milliseconds)
- Add module field ("fcp-mesh")
- Add phase field ("start", "complete", "fail")
- Add correlation_id for cross-event tracing
- Add result field for test outcome

New helper:
- test_correlation_id(): Generate deterministic correlation IDs
  using blake3 hash of test_name + category

Updated emit_test_start/emit_test_pass/emit_test_fail to populate
all required fields for standard log compliance.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
